violations.text: Soap and paper towels were not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap and paper towels. Soap and paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the kitchen prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2025
The drop ceiling in the basement is in poor repair. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a fan. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to increase pest control as frequently as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the dough flattener have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
The 1 door reach in freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice build up. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
The drop ceiling in the basement and kitchen area is in poor repair. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

1 door fridge and misc food was was observed held at (43) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Establishment adjusted the dial, fridge holding ambient of 41 Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
The droop ceiling above the stove in in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
